title: Bare Bones x Fresh Flower Pots
description: Bare Bones textures for Fresh Flower Pots ! 🏺
body:
![Bare Bones x Fresh Flower Pots logo](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ed60f23b83751e7b6c6847d1fc45b3df12971953.png)
-----------

This resource pack adds Bare Bones textures for [Fresh Flower Pots](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/fresh-flower-pots) !

You have to place it above the default Fresh Flower Pots in the resource pack list

I also use [Bare Bones PBR x128](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones-pbr-x128) in the screenshots
